testsuite.name: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: user navigates to DemoQA Browser Windows page
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: User clicks on "Alerts, Frame & Windows" in the left panel
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: User clicks on "Browser Windows" menu item
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: User clicks the "New Tab" button
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: A new tab should open with the expected URL
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: The new tab should display the heading "This is a sample page"
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: User switches back to the original tab
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content

testcase.name: The original tab should still display the Browser Windows page
testcase.classname: Verify new tab opens with correct URL and content
